name: Hummus Tamales
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the filling: Blend all filling ingredients in a food processor until you have a thick paste. If needed, add a small amount of water to achieve your desired consistency.
2. Fill and cook tamales according to the basic procedure for making tamales.
3. Per serving (2 tamales): 468 calories; 7 grams protein; 401 milligrams sodium; 83 grams carbohydrates; 10 grams fat; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 95 milligrams calcium.
4. Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993/MM by DEEANNE
